text.tspan: Rate of confirmed COVID-19 cases per million people vs visitors to retail
and recreation locations, Nov 24, 2020 to Jan 15, 2021
Visitors to retail and recreation locations – like restaurants, cafes, shopping centers, theme parks, museums, libraries, and
movie theaters – are measured relative to a baseline before the outbreak of the pandemic.
Daily new confirmed cases of COVID-19 per million people
Source: Google COVID-19 Community Mobility Trends – Last updated 18 January, 18:02 (London time), Johns Hopkins University CSSE
COVID-19 Data – Last updated 20 January, 11:02 (London time), Population (Gapminder, HYDE(2016) & UN (2019)), Our World In Data
